summary: Testing Quiz Tematici (1000 questions in 33 categories) feature. All backend APIs pass (15/15 tests). Frontend UI working: 3 tabs visible, Quiz Tematici selected by default, 33 categories displayed, clicking category starts quiz with 30 questions, language translation of category titles works across all 6 languages.
critical_code_review_comments: quiz_1000.py: Well-structured with CATEGORY_TRANSLATIONS for all 6 languages (it, es, en, de, fr, pt)
quiz_categories_data.json: Contains all 1000 questions organized in 33 categories
quiz.tsx: UI correctly implements 3 tabs with Quiz Tematici as default, info banner showing 1000 domande in 33 categorie
api.ts: Correctly implements getQuizCategories and getQuizByCategory methods
seed_data_creation: None required - quiz data comes from quiz_categories_data.json
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz categories feature fully tested. 33 categories with 1000 total questions. Each category quiz serves 30 questions. Language translations work for category titles in IT, ES, EN, DE, FR, PT.

quiz_tematici_tab_default.details: Quiz Tematici tab is selected by default with olive green highlight

33_categories_displayed.details: API returns 33 categories, UI displays all 33

category_quiz_30_questions.details: Clicking category starts quiz showing '1/30' progress indicator

language_translation_titles.details: Category titles properly translate when language changes (e.g., Abramo -> Abraham)

quiz_classici_tab.details: Classic quizzes tab shows existing quiz topics (Quiz su Genesi, Quiz sui Salmi, etc.)

screenshots.quiz_thematic_tab: Shows Quiz Tematici tab selected, 33 categories with domande counts
screenshots.quiz_classic_tab: Shows Quiz Classici tab with classic quiz topics
screenshots.quiz_started: Shows quiz started with question, 4 options, 1/30 progress
